text.message: I assume I shouldn't respond to your nb requests in the future?
you just stole my wheat and plowed
that's where my road was pointing
you were trying to plow me
you attempt at plow is why i used monop
i mean we were both going for a spot
i mean, that was your choice to take the risk, you knew i was going there from my road
i know i wasnt complaining just thought asking for a 2 for 1 right after was a little much
wheat is very rare for me
hmm.  the 8 ore is kind of a good block...
black road road settle btw, i think its best for me to keep road
i agree with that.  not sure why red blocked ya
blue, you capped at 11, so you keep if ya want.
so suggest keeping the robber where it is
no one is taking road lol
not sure why i was embargoed of all people. ha ha
why did you give him a city?
